offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 sites/month, inefficient log consolidation causes compliance risks. We automate the consolidation of safety logs instead of manual log consolidation and reporting.
problem: Inefficient consolidation of safety logs leading to compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of safety logs and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
